3017540.name: Slice Of Ages
3017540.description: Slice and dice your way through enemies in this top-down action roguelike.  Take advantage of special relics to reach the magical macguffin: the Slice of Ages.  The Slice of Ages is heavily guarded by the evil forces of Dastardly Duck deep within his dungeon.  While descending his dungeon, the hero, Duck Knight, will encounter a lot of opposition; even others trying to retrieve the Slice of Ages.  Relics will help you on your descent.  Some greatly increase your attack speed while others will cause you to explode at random.  And just try not to lose Duck Knight's head while trying to get the Slice of Ages.
